title: Japanese-Style Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Japanese-inspired stir fry made with crispy vegetables and your choice of protein.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced carrots and cook for 3-4 minutes, until tender.
Add the broccoli and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce and sesame oil.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the vegetables and stir to coat.
Sprinkle with sesame seeds and serve hot.
